This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

Glamox and our selected partners use cookies and similar technologies (together “cookies”) that are necessary to present this website, and to ensure you get the best experience of it. If you consent to it, we will also use cookies for analytics and marketing purposes.

See our Cookie Policy to read more about the cookies we set.

You can withdraw and manage your consent at any time, by clicking “Manage cookies” at the bottom of each website page.

Select which cookies you accept

On this site, we always set cookies that are strictly necessary, meaning they are necessary for the site to function properly.

If you consent to it, we will also set other types of cookies. You can provide or withdraw your consent to the different types of cookies using the toggles below. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, by clicking the link “Manage Cookies”, which is always available at the bottom of the site.

To learn more about what the different types of cookies do, how your data is used when they are set etc, see our Cookie Policy.

These cookies are necessary to make the site work properly, and are always set when you visit the site.

Vendors Teamtailor

These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used.

Vendors Teamtailor

These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you. In some cases, they also deliver additional functions on the site.

Marine, Offshore & Wind · Ålesund · Hybrid

R&D Product Developer, Mechanics

Introduction

Are you motivated by developing robust mechanical solutions for innovative lighting products used in demanding marine, offshore, and harsh environments?

You'll design mechanical solutions that endure some of the harshest conditions on the planet — corrosive saltwater environments, explosive atmospheres, and the relentless vibration of offshore platforms. What you build will be installed on vessels and structures across the globe.

Glamox Marine, Offshore & Wind is looking for a Product Developer Mechanics to join our dedicated R&D team. This is a key role where your technical expertise directly influences product quality, performance, and reliability.

What you'll do

You will be involved in the design and development of mechanical solutions for advanced lighting products used in marine, offshore, and defense applications — collaborating closely with electronics, software, optical, and production engineers in a forward-thinking cross-functional environment.

WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON:

— Design and develop mechanical solutions for next-generation lighting products

— Create and refine 3D models, drawings, and technical product documentation

— Participate in system integration to ensure seamless interaction between mechanical, electronic, optical, and software components

— Plan, support, and document mechanical testing and product verification activities

— Contribute to design for manufacturability, robustness, and long-term reliability of installation-friendly products

— Contribute to mechanical development across other product categories when needed

Who you are

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Qualifications

— Bachelor's degree in mechanical engineering, product design, or a related field

— 3–5 years of relevant experience in mechanical product development

— Experience in 3D CAD design software — SolidWorks or similar tools

— Good understanding of materials, manufacturing methods, and assembly processes

— Hands-on attitude with regard to prototyping and building functional mock-ups

— Ability to collaborate closely with electronics, software, optical, production, and laboratory engineers

— Experience with lighting products, thermal design, harsh environments, ATEX, or marine/offshore applications — considered a strong advantage

— Strong communication skills in Norwegian and/or English

Personal attributes

— A team player with a collaborative mindset

— Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

— Curious, driven, and eager to learn new technologies

— Thrives in a dynamic and innovative environment

— Takes pride in delivering robust, high-quality solutions

Why join Glamox

We offer an end-to-end product development involvement — from prototyping and testing to industrialization and launch. We are an international, purpose-driven company operating in demanding, high-stakes industries, and we have strong focus on innovation, quality, and modern technologies

We offer flexible working hours and the option to work remotely for a genuine work-life balance with competitive compensation and benefits. We have a supportive and inclusive work culture, were there are plenty of opportunties for continuous learning and professional development.

Questions?

Contact Frode Kolgrov — Team Lead, MOW R&D

frode.kolgrov@glamox.com

FAQ

  • Can I send an unsolicited application?

    We are always looking for new colleagues! Stay up to date on future jobs, or tell us why you would like to work with us by clicking here to connect! Here you can also subscribe to positions.

  • When will I receive an answer to my application?

    Each job advertisement states when you can expect a response. It depends a bit on the type of job, and we process applications continuously. Sometimes it takes time to find the right match. Contact the recruiter if you think it has been a long time.

  • ​What does the recruitment process look like?

    It varies depending on the role. Normally, we form the recruitment process as follows: application, telephone interview, first-time interview, second-time interview, and tests.

  • Can I apply for more than one role?

    Yes, you’re welcome to apply for multiple roles if your experience matches the requirements. We encourage you to tailor your application to each position.

  • Do you offer remote or hybrid work?

    Work arrangements vary by role and location. Many of our positions offer flexible or hybrid working options. Please check the job description for details.
